title: That's A Smart Phone
description: Ever want your very own Nokia 3310?
body:
This Mod adds the Nokia 3310 to Minecraft!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bgO4TpIyXcU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Here are some features you'll see in this mod:**
- Nokia 3310 with functional buttons
- Two new Ores added to the mines
- New Villager Trades
- 12 New Advancements
- Tons of Confusion!

Download the mod TODAY!

This mod is not affiliated with the Nokia Corporation™️
